claim_boundary: Prediction-only sweeps from a FDM-1-style temporal masked-diffusion checkpoint; target labels were not used for calibration and this is not G005 completion evidence.
diagnosis: Removing retrieval priors and increasing recall-oriented train-split calibration did not recover target action-token identity; mouse-button exact TP remains zero and keyboard/mouse-motion remain near zero. This points to representation/objective scale or temporal/action-token identity learning, not only inference thresholding.
